'''damate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kittycorner|kittycorner]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kittycorner|kittycorner]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| damate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:damate|damate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:damatesher|damatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:damatesherĂ«m|damatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:damatero|damatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:damateshĂ«|damateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:damateshĂ«m|damateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidamatero|gokidamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidamateshĂ«|gokidamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidamateshĂ«m|gokidamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godamankerom|godamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godamankeshĂ«|godamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godamankeshĂ«m|godamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godamankeya|godamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:damaterom|damaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:damatemu|damatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:damateya|damateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidamaterom|gokidamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidamatemu|gokidamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidamateya|gokidamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:damamate|damamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:damamatesher|damamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:damamatesherĂ«m|damamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:damamatero|damamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:damamateshĂ«|damamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:damamateshĂ«m|damamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidamamatero|gokidamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidamamateshĂ«|gokidamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidamamateshĂ«m|gokidamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godamamankerom|godamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godamamankeshĂ«|godamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godamamankeshĂ«m|godamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godamamankeya|godamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:damamaterom|damamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:damamatemu|damamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:damamateya|damamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidamamaterom|gokidamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidamamatemu|gokidamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidamamateya|gokidamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠmĂŠte|dĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠmĂŠtesher|dĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠmĂŠtero|dĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠmĂŠtero|gokidĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠmĂŠnkerom|godĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠmĂŠnkeya|godĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠmĂŠterom|dĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠmĂŠtemu|dĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠmĂŠteya|dĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠmĂŠterom|gokidĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠmĂŠteya|gokidĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafmafte|dafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafmaftesher|dafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafmaftesherĂ«m|dafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafmaftero|dafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafmafteshĂ«|dafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafmafteshĂ«m|dafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafmaftero|gokidafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafmafteshĂ«|gokidafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafmafteshĂ«m|gokidafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafmafnkerom|godafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafmafnkeshĂ«|godafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafmafnkeshĂ«m|godafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafmafnkeya|godafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafmafterom|dafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafmaftemu|dafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafmafteya|dafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafmafterom|gokidafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafmaftemu|gokidafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafmafteya|gokidafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
